'''âs-b-v''' ('''kasabav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:youngen|youngen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-b-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:youngen|youngen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-b-v
|-
! Lemma
| kasabav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisabav|thisabav]] || [[word:jisabav|jisabav]] || [[word:shisabav|shisabav]] || [[word:kisabav|kisabav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusabav|thuthusabav]] || [[word:jujusabav|jujusabav]] || [[word:shushusabav|shushusabav]] || [[word:kukusabav|kukusabav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusabav|thusabav]] || [[word:jusabav|jusabav]] || [[word:shusabav|shusabav]] || [[word:kusabav|kusabav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusabav|thusabav]] || [[word:jusabav|jusabav]] || [[word:shusabav|shusabav]] || [[word:kusabav|kusabav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesabav|thesabav]] || [[word:jesabav|jesabav]] || [[word:shesabav|shesabav]] || [[word:kesabav|kesabav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosabav|thothosabav]] || [[word:jojosabav|jojosabav]] || [[word:shoshosabav|shoshosabav]] || [[word:kokosabav|kokosabav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosabav|thosabav]] || [[word:josabav|josabav]] || [[word:shosabav|shosabav]] || [[word:kosabav|kosabav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosabav|thosabav]] || [[word:josabav|josabav]] || [[word:shosabav|shosabav]] || [[word:kosabav|kosabav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsabav|thĂŠsabav]] || [[word:jĂŠsabav|jĂŠsabav]] || [[word:shĂŠsabav|shĂŠsabav]] || [[word:kĂŠsabav|kĂŠsabav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasabav|thathasabav]] || [[word:jajasabav|jajasabav]] || [[word:shashasabav|shashasabav]] || [[word:kakasabav|kakasabav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasabav|thasabav]] || [[word:jasabav|jasabav]] || [[word:shasabav|shasabav]] || [[word:kasabav|kasabav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasabav|thasabav]] || [[word:jasabav|jasabav]] || [[word:shasabav|shasabav]] || [[word:kasabav|kasabav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasabav|shasabav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasabav|goshasabav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasabav|gokishasabav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasabavnĂŒ|shasabavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasabavnknĂŒ|goshasabavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasabavnĂŒ|gokishasabavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasabavshĂ«|shasabavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasabavnkshĂ«|goshasabavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasabavshĂ«|gokishasabavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasabavro|shasabavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasabavnkro|goshasabavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasabavro|gokishasabavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasabavmu|shasabavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasabavnkmu|goshasabavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasabavmu|gokishasabavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasabavsher|shasabavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasabavnksher|goshasabavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasabavsher|gokishasabavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasabavng|shasabavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasabavnkng|goshasabavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasabavng|gokishasabavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasabavya|shasabavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasabavnkya|goshasabavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasabavya|gokishasabavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasabavyam|shasabavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasabavnkyam|goshasabavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasabavyam|gokishasabavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasabavnĂŒshĂ«|shasabavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasabavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasabavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasabavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasabavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasabavnĂŒro|shasabavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasabavnknĂŒro|goshasabavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasabavnĂŒro|gokishasabavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasabavnĂŒmu|shasabavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasabavnknĂŒmu|goshasabavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasabavnĂŒmu|gokishasabavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasabavshĂ«nĂŒ|shasabavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasabavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasabavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasabavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasabavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasabavshĂ«ro|shasabavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasabavnkshĂ«ro|goshasabavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasabavshĂ«ro|gokishasabavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasabavshĂ«mu|shasabavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasabavnkshĂ«mu|goshasabavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasabavshĂ«mu|gokishasabavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasabavronĂŒ|shasabavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasabavnkronĂŒ|goshasabavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasabavronĂŒ|gokishasabavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasabavroshĂ«|shasabavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasabavnkroshĂ«|goshasabavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasabavroshĂ«|gokishasabavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasabavromu|shasabavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasabavnkromu|goshasabavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasabavromu|gokishasabavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasabavmunĂŒ|shasabavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasabavnkmunĂŒ|goshasabavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasabavmunĂŒ|gokishasabavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasabavmushĂ«|shasabavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasabavnkmushĂ«|goshasabavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasabavmushĂ«|gokishasabavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasabavmuro|shasabavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasabavnkmuro|goshasabavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasabavmuro|gokishasabavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
